title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Burger King India South Asia Partners
company: Burger King India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Burger King India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Burger King India South Asia Partners in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Burger King India South Asia Partners:
Burger King India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India South Asia Partners!
